Off Calendar May-15-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Minors Compromise
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, Megan Barry-Schoen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Frank S. Moore, Esq. appeared with petitioner Dr. Nancy Nicole Barry, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Megan Barry-Schoen, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Dr. Barry Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on December 11, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $70,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $16,293.89.
Medical Bills - $5,874.94.
Costs - $4,824.44.

The net balance of $43,006.73 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 135 Serramonte Center, Daily City, CA 94015. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to June 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
